summary: A DHS retweet of a raw C-SPAN2 clip of President Trump speaking to reporters aboard Air Force One, praising ICE and attacking the prior administration's border policies. The high music score is a false positive; the footage is an unedited press gaggle with a C-SPAN2 chyron and no music or cinematic styling.
notable_text: On-screen: 'TRUMP SPEAKS TO REPORTERS ABOARD AIR FORCE ONE' / 'C-SPAN2'.
